text: Hello? Hi, good evening, my name is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through South Carolina State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
